description: During boot, assumed Plaud script required Chrome because token was absent from sandbox. Script actually uses cached API token at ~/.config/plaud/token.json on the Mac — Chrome is only a fallback if no token AND no credentials exist. Should have run the script via Desktop Commander and let it fail or succeed on its own.
correction: Always attempt to run fetch_plaud.py via Desktop Commander (Mac execution) before concluding it needs a browser flow. The script handles auth gracefully and exits with code 2 only if credentials are truly missing.
systemic_fix: Run fetch_plaud.py via mcp__Desktop_Commander__start_process on the Mac during boot. Do not pre-assume auth failure.
